[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: Overview: A side-view illustrated scene shows a boy in a blue jacket standing in a room while two other figures stand beside a car hood and appear to be reading or working on it.

Main Subject: The primary focus is a young man with short black hair facing right, shown in profile. He wears a blue hooded jacket with a rectangular sticker on the back that includes the text “DRAG & DRIVE” and “SIMULATION” along with an image of a motorcycle and other small graphic elements; the sticker also contains a red section with the word “UPDATE.”

Setting: The background appears to be indoors, resembling a workshop or garage area. Light-colored walls and a doorway are visible, along with shelves and stacked objects. In the right half of the image, a car-like object with a brown base and a darker underside sits near the foreground, while the room’s depth is suggested by window frames and light beams.

Visual Details: The composition is framed with the main person occupying the left foreground, shown from shoulders up and turned toward the right. His hair is outlined in bold black lines with stylized shading. The jacket is a solid blue with folds indicated by darker lines. In the right background, two smaller illustrated figures in light-colored tops with ties stand close to the car hood area, leaning forward slightly as if examining something near the vehicle. Their hair is light and dark respectively, and their faces are drawn with simple linework. The lighting is bright and even, with a warm tone in the background.

Visible Text: “DRAG & DRIVE” “SIMULATION” “UPDATE”

Practical Summary: The image shows an illustrated young man in a blue jacket with a visible game-like poster sticker on his back. Behind him, two figures stand by a car hood in an indoor garage/workshop setting.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
